'''shotazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quackademic|quackademic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-t-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quackademic|quackademic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shotazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shotazhithi|shotazhithi]] || [[word:shotazhiji|shotazhiji]] || [[word:shotazhishi|shotazhishi]] || [[word:shotazhiki|shotazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shotazhuthuthu|shotazhuthuthu]] || [[word:shotazhujuju|shotazhujuju]] || [[word:shotazhushushu|shotazhushushu]] || [[word:shotazhukuku|shotazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shotazhuthu|shotazhuthu]] || [[word:shotazhuju|shotazhuju]] || [[word:shotazhushu|shotazhushu]] || [[word:shotazhuku|shotazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shotazhufthuf|shotazhufthuf]] || [[word:shotazhufjuf|shotazhufjuf]] || [[word:shotazhufshuf|shotazhufshuf]] || [[word:shotazhufkuf|shotazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shotazhethe|shotazhethe]] || [[word:shotazheje|shotazheje]] || [[word:shotazheshe|shotazheshe]] || [[word:shotazheke|shotazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shotazhothotho|shotazhothotho]] || [[word:shotazhojojo|shotazhojojo]] || [[word:shotazhoshosho|shotazhoshosho]] || [[word:shotazhokoko|shotazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shotazhotho|shotazhotho]] || [[word:shotazhojo|shotazhojo]] || [[word:shotazhosho|shotazhosho]] || [[word:shotazhoko|shotazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shotazhofthof|shotazhofthof]] || [[word:shotazhofjof|shotazhofjof]] || [[word:shotazhofshof|shotazhofshof]] || [[word:shotazhofkof|shotazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfthĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfjĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfshĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfkĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfthĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfjĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfshĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfkĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfthĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfjĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfshĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shotazhĂŻfkĂŻf|shotazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shotazhĂŠthĂŠ|shotazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shotazhĂŠjĂŠ|shotazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shotazhĂŠshĂŠ|shotazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shotazhĂŠkĂŠ|shotazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shotazhathatha|shotazhathatha]] || [[word:shotazhajaja|shotazhajaja]] || [[word:shotazhashasha|shotazhashasha]] || [[word:shotazhakaka|shotazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shotazhatha|shotazhatha]] || [[word:shotazhaja|shotazhaja]] || [[word:shotazhasha|shotazhasha]] || [[word:shotazhaka|shotazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shotazhafthaf|shotazhafthaf]] || [[word:shotazhafjaf|shotazhafjaf]] || [[word:shotazhafshaf|shotazhafshaf]] || [[word:shotazhafkaf|shotazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shotazhasha|shotazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shotazhshĂ«sha|shotazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shotazhrosha|shotazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shotazhmusha|shotazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shotazhyasha|shotazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshotazhnkshĂ«sha|goshotazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshotazhnkrosha|goshotazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshotazhnkmusha|goshotazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshotazhnkyasha|goshotazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shotatazhasha|shotatazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shotatazhshĂ«sha|shotatazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shotatazhrosha|shotatazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shotatazhmusha|shotatazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shotatazhyasha|shotatazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshotatazhnkshĂ«sha|goshotatazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshotatazhnkrosha|goshotatazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshotatazhnkmusha|goshotatazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshotatazhnkyasha|goshotatazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shetĂŠzhasha|shetĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shetĂŠzhshĂ«sha|shetĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shetĂŠzhrosha|shetĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shetĂŠzhmusha|shetĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shetĂŠzhyasha|shetĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshetĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|goshetĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshetĂŠzhnkrosha|goshetĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshetĂŠzhnkmusha|goshetĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshetĂŠzhnkyasha|goshetĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shotfazhasha|shotfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shotfazhshĂ«sha|shotfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shotfazhrosha|shotfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shotfazhmusha|shotfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shotfazhyasha|shotfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshotfazhnkshĂ«sha|goshotfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshotfazhnkrosha|goshotfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshotfazhnkmusha|goshotfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshotfazhnkyasha|goshotfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
